3313830.name: Battle Ball
3313830.description: Battle Ball is a fast-paced futuristic sports game set in a vibrant cyberpunk world. As the manager of a high-tech team, you’re in control of every strategic decision—draft top players, hire expert coaches, and make bold trades to build a championship-winning squad. But the action doesn’t stop there. Take the field yourself to play intense, high-octane matches, combining skill, speed, and strategy as you outmaneuver opponents in the arena. Will your team dominate the neon-lit stadiums and rise to the top in this futuristic sport? The future of the game is in your hands.
3313830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
